item.title: Focusflow 1.0.6
item.description:
What's new

  • Added a new transcript toolbar with a microphone source dropdown and one-click transcript copy.
  • Improved transcript summary reliability after meetings by preventing the inter-app summary listener from silently stopping.
  • Added a richer Ask AI experience with a redesigned panel, typewriter-style response reveal, and improved feedback/copy interactions.
  • Updated Note Details screens and supporting snapshot coverage for transcript, recording controls, and summary states.
  • Refined event rows and timers, including clearer imminent/started states and better dashboard banner behavior.
  • Suppressed meeting detection notifications when an event is about to start (within 15 minutes) to reduce noise.
  • Introduced a YAML-configurable transcription policy for recording/silence/session behavior.
  • Improved note details and popover UI behavior (including dynamic popover resize fixes and Today/Yesterday date headers).
  • Improved resilience around offline auth/token refresh and coroutine error handling.
  • Added multiple stability and visual polish fixes across Notes, Ask AI, and recording-related flows.

item.title: Focusflow 1.0.8
item.description:
What's new

  • Added a new transcript toolbar with a microphone source dropdown and one-click transcript copy.
  • Improved transcript summary reliability after meetings by preventing the inter-app summary listener from silently stopping.
  • Added a richer Ask AI experience with a redesigned panel, typewriter-style response reveal, and improved feedback/copy interactions.
  • Updated Note Details screens and supporting snapshot coverage for transcript, recording controls, and summary states.
  • Refined event rows and timers, including clearer imminent/started states and better dashboard banner behavior.
  • Suppressed meeting detection notifications when an event is about to start (within 15 minutes) to reduce noise.
  • Introduced a YAML-configurable transcription policy for recording/silence/session behavior.
  • Improved note details and popover UI behavior (including dynamic popover resize fixes and Today/Yesterday date headers).
  • Improved resilience around offline auth/token refresh and coroutine error handling.
  • Added multiple stability and visual polish fixes across Notes, Ask AI, and recording-related flows.

item.title: Focusflow 1.0.9
item.description:
What's new

  • The helper tray menu now shows today's meetings with "Now" and "Today" sections, including time ranges and a recording indicator. Tap any event to jump straight to its note, or hit "New Meeting" to create one.
  • If your microphone is muted or silent during recording, a floating notification appears after a few seconds. It fires once per session so it won't nag you repeatedly.
  • Hold Ctrl+Option+Command to dictate text via Deepgram streaming. Enable in helper tray QA settings. This is a proof-of-concept.
  • The Ask AI panel now remembers whether you left it open or closed, auto-hides after generating a summary, and shrinks to an icon on narrow windows. Input is locked while the AI response is animating.
  • Clicking "Join" on a Google Meet link now routes through Google's account chooser so the browser picks the right account automatically.
  • Note details, settings, and calendars now show shimmer placeholders while loading, with smooth crossfade transitions throughout navigation.
  • The "Resume Recording" button now honors the grace period from your transcription policy instead of always using 5 hours.
  • Updates are now distributed as a DMG with drag-to-Applications install.
  • Fixed a crash during audio tap teardown when ending meetings or switching audio devices.
  • The Ask AI panel overlays on top of notes instead of shrinking their width.
